message:
Merge PR #1980: fix(doctor): patrol-not-stuck queries Dolt DB instead of stale JSONL

Adds Dolt SQL query path with JSONL fallback for stuck-wisp detection in
patrol-not-stuck doctor check.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/1980
Author: Xexr
